inline_comments.message: Having multiple definitions of property 'branch' is not correct unless you are defining them under a Streams section (e.g. https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ci-management.git;f=jjb/so/so-csit.yaml;hb=6069446db772e6b2e8a769191a523c4fd111358b#l10). Please remove the old value and only leave the one you want to use.
